meaning: adj.吹毛求疵的,好挑剔的,过分讲究的
examples: Some people are very picky about who they choose to share their lives with.
Early adopter buyers tend to be picky consumers.
But he's mighty picky -- having sifted through 160 opportunities without finding one he likes.
He's very picky about the softness of the sheets and imports toilet paper from Thailand.
